description_long: This is a modern duplex house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, set within a fenced rectangular lot. The front facade features two main entryways, each with a small porch, flanked by decorative shrubs and a paved walkway leading to the street. The exterior is predominantly white with vertical wooden accent panels, and large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides. The backyard is spacious and enclosed by a wooden fence, providing private green space for each unit. The side and rear views reveal minimal ornamentation, emphasizing the contemporary, functional design. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a two-lane road at the front, integrating it seamlessly into an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, flat-roofed duplex house with white walls, wooden accents, large windows, and fenced front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entryways, decorative shrubs, paved walkways, and the street-facing facade with large windows and wooden accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, vertical wooden panels, and the fenced backyard extending behind the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive, private backyard areas for each unit, minimal windows, and the continuous wooden fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, additional windows, and the transition from the backyard to the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Twin recessed entryways with small porches, steps, and minimalistic landscaping at the front.
